hotspots.name: Ghazipur Underpass
hotspots.description: Poorly lit underpass with history of snatching incidents. Avoid at night.

hotspots.name: NH24 Service Road (Ghazipur stretch)
hotspots.description: Dark service road running parallel to NH24. Isolated after 10 PM.

hotspots.name: Shakarpur Lane (back roads)
hotspots.description: Narrow lanes with poor lighting. Reported snatching and harassment cases.

hotspots.name: Rohini Sector 3 Back Roads
hotspots.description: Residential back lanes with minimal street lighting after midnight.

hotspots.name: Noida Expressway Service Road
hotspots.description: Very isolated after midnight. Few exits. Avoid for two-wheelers at night.

hotspots.name: Shahdara Market Area
hotspots.description: Heavy crowding in evening. Pickpocketing reported in market lanes.

hotspots.name: Kalindi Kunj Eastern Approach
hotspots.description: Bridge approach from Noida side is very poorly lit. No police presence at night.

hotspots.name: Okhla Industrial Area (back lanes)
hotspots.description: Industrial area deserted after factory hours. Minimal lighting.

hotspots.name: GTB Nagar Metro Exit 2 Lane
hotspots.description: Lane behind metro station poorly lit. Use main road instead.

hotspots.name: Sector 62 Noida Industrial Pocket
hotspots.description: Office/industrial zone empties after 9 PM. Avoid shortcuts through this area.

safezones.name: DND Flyway (full stretch)
safezones.description: Fully lit, CCTV every 200m, police stationed at both ends 24x7

safezones.name: Ring Road / NH48 Main Carriageway
safezones.description: Major arterial road, well-lit, always has traffic

safezones.name: Noida City Centre Metro Station
safezones.description: CISF security, CCTV, women's helpdesk available

safezones.name: Connaught Place (Inner Circle)
safezones.description: Heavy police presence, fully lit, always crowded till midnight

safezones.name: Saket Select Citywalk Area
safezones.description: Mall security, well-lit surroundings, busy till 11 PM

safezones.name: Noida Sector 18 Market
safezones.description: Busy market area, well-lit, active till late evening

safezones.name: Ashram Metro Station
safezones.description: CISF security, connects Ring Road and DND
